title: Trash Heap
description:
You discover a towering pile of [red][jitter]scrapped weapons[/jitter][/red], [orange]discarded trinkets[/orange], and [purple][sine]other oddities[/sine][/purple]. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...

If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some [gold]exotic treasures[/gold].

options.title: Dive In
options.description: Lose [red]8[/red] HP. Obtain a random forgotten [gold]Relic[/gold] from the past.

options.title: Grab Random Junk
options.description: Gain [blue]100[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.

conditions: All players have more than 5 HP
notes:
The [red]Dive In[/red] HP loss is [gold]Unblockable[/gold] — it bypasses Block entirely.

[gold]Dive In[/gold] gives a random relic from a fixed pool of [blue]5[/blue] relics: [gold]Darkstone Periapt[/gold], [gold]Dream Catcher[/gold], [gold]Hand Drill[/gold], [gold]Maw Bank[/gold], and [gold]The Boot[/gold].

[gold]Grab Random Junk[/gold] gives a random card from a fixed pool of [blue]10[/blue] cards: [gold]Caltrops[/gold], [gold]Clash[/gold], [gold]Distraction[/gold], [gold]Dual Wield[/gold], [gold]Entrench[/gold], [gold]Hello World[/gold], [gold]Outmaneuver[/gold], [gold]Rebound[/gold], [gold]Rip and Tear[/gold], and [gold]Stack[/gold]. The card is added directly to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
